mnemonics: Queen Under Every Excellent Ear (Queue Under Every Excellent Ear)
Cops Understand Everyone Everywhere Arrests (Cops Understand Everyone Everywhere Arrests)
keyPoints: Circular Queue: Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) but wraps around to the start when full
Using Dynamic Arrays: Efficient but may lead to overwriting data
Multiple Stacks and Queues: Implementing priority queues and queues with multiple operations
